## Types of changes
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)

## AI Usage
<!-- It is completely fine to use AI tools! We just want to know for tracking purposes. -->
- [ ] I used AI tools (like Copilot, ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude) to help write this code.
- [ ] I did not use AI tools to help write this code.

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project (`cargo fmt`).
- [ ] I have run `cargo clippy` and fixed any warnings.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly.
- [ ] I have added tests to cover my changes.
- [ ] All new and existing tests passed.
